---
title: "TRSE units: X86"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE
---

# X86

These paths are relative to `units/X86/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `gfx/cga16`
- `gfx/fonts`
- `gfx/gfx`
- `gfx/lib3dx86`
- `gfx/poly_cga`
- `gfx/poly_cga16`
- `gfx/tiles`
- `music/adlibplayer`
- `music/beeplay`
- `music/monplay`
- `system/file`
- `system/memory`
- `system/screen`
- `system/tables`
- `text/txt`
